scripts.badges:generate: coverage-badges --source coverage/coverage-summary.json --output coverage/badge-statements.svg --label statements --jsonPath total.statements.pct && coverage-badges --source coverage/coverage-summary.json --output coverage/badge-lines.svg --label lines --jsonPath total.lines.pct && coverage-badges --source coverage/coverage-summary.json --output coverage/badge-functions.svg --label functions --jsonPath total.functions.pct && coverage-badges --source coverage/coverage-summary.json --output coverage/badge-branches.svg --label branches --jsonPath total.branches.pct
